title: Playtest defaults file (playtest.yaml)
description: Shared defaults for every case at or below this directory; the nearest playtest.yaml wins per key. Case-only keys (story, tags, success, report, personas) are config errors here — put them in the case file. max_steps/timeout may also be spelled nested under limits.

persona.description: Default persona the actor role-plays: built-in "tester" or "exploratory", or the name/slug of a personas/*.yaml file. Default "tester". A case file can override it (or fan out with the case-only "personas").

mode.description: Case kind for every case below, default "journey". journey: regression test — deterministic success gate, baseline record/act/heal, pass/fail exit codes. discovery: product-insight study — no success gate, always a fresh agentic run that ends "explored" (give_up is a valid, informative outcome), graded with the discoverability rubric. A study directory sets mode: discovery here once.

lcp_ms.description: Threshold on the WORST navigation LCP in milliseconds: "< 2500" style (ops < <= > >=) or a bare number meaning <= n.

input_to_paint_ms.description: Threshold on the WORST input-to-paint latency in milliseconds; same format as lcp_ms.

console_errors.description: Maximum allowed console error count, e.g. 0.

perf.description: Perf thresholds checked with the journey gate. Silently irrelevant in discovery (the gate never runs).

max_steps.description: Maximum actor steps before a run ends with end_reason max_steps. Default 50. Equivalent nested spelling: limits.max_steps.

timeout.description: Wall-clock limit per run: "5m", "90s", "250ms", or a number of milliseconds. Default "4m". Equivalent nested spelling: limits.timeout.

limits.description: Nested spelling of max_steps/timeout; normalized to the top-level keys at load time.

actor_model.description: Model that role-plays the user. Default "claude-haiku-4-5" (pinned cheap — for journeys the app is the variable, not the agent). Discovery studies often choose a stronger model, e.g. "claude-sonnet-4-6".

grader_model.description: Model that grades finished runs and checks assert: criteria. Default "claude-sonnet-4-6".

base_url.description: Where the app under test runs, e.g. http://localhost:4173. Required somewhere in the chain (or pass --base-url). Agents really click buy/delete/submit — point at staging or test, never production.

compose.description: docker-compose file path, relative to this file: managed mode — the harness boots and tears down the app per run.

init.description: Executable script path, relative to this file, run before each case to reset app state.

storage_state.description: Playwright storage-state JSON path, relative to this file, for a pre-authenticated browser session.

app.description: App under test. Merges per-key down the defaults chain, so deeper files or the case can override just base_url.
